THE CURRENT MOTION IS MOOT GIVEN THE SERVICE OF SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $650 AWARDED BECAUSE THE UNTIMELY SERVICE OF THE RESPONSES NECESSITATED THIS MOTION. THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not Argued/discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANTs FRANKLIN BEATTIE, III, PIYATIDA BEATTIE's Motion To Compel Olivia Nava's Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One), Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions:

JPT McDonald discloses that while he has not ever had any professional or personal contacts with Cross-Defendants' counsel, Peter Vestal, he has had communications recently with him regarding one case that both were handling as Judge Pro Tems and involved an issue of judicial consistency of decisions. The current motion is moot given the service of supplemental responses. Sanctions in the amount of $650 awarded because the untimely service of the responses necessitated this motion.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to davididaho14@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
